name: What happens if AI hallucinates wrong facts in my attorney's brief?
description: Sanctions possible—lawyers must verify AI output.[3]

mainEntity.name: What happens if AI hallucinates wrong facts in my attorney's brief?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sanctions possible—lawyers must verify AI output.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Lawyers face sanctions for filing unverified AI content with errors, as they must ensure court statements are accurate.[3] Ethics rules require verifying GAI output before reliance.[3] Key factors: Hallucinations are common; disclosure may be needed; client confidentiality can't be breached.[3] Demand your lawyer explains their verification process. Courts are cracking down on AI misuse.
